description: Biography of the Prophet Muhammad ﷺ — key events, battles, companions, and milestones

questions.question: When and where was the Prophet Muhammad ﷺ born? Describe his early life.
What was the first revelation received by the Prophet ﷺ? Describe the full event.
What were the key events of the Battle of Badr? When did it happen and what was its significance?
Describe the Hijra (migration) of the Prophet ﷺ from Makkah to Madinah. What year did it occur?
Who were the four rightly-guided Caliphs (Khulafa al-Rashidun)? List them in order with key achievements.
Describe the Farewell Sermon (Khutbat al-Wada') of the Prophet ﷺ. What were its main points?
What happened at the Battle of Uhud? What lessons does it teach?
Who were the 10 companions promised paradise (al-asharah al-mubasharun)?
Describe the Treaty of Hudaybiyyah. Why was it called a 'clear victory' in the Quran?
When and how did the Prophet ﷺ pass away? Describe his final days.
What was the Isra and Mi'raj (Night Journey and Ascension)? What was prescribed during this event?
Describe the personality and character of the Prophet ﷺ. How does the Quran describe him?
What were the major miracles of the Prophet Muhammad ﷺ besides the Quran?
Describe the Conquest of Makkah (Fath al-Makkah). What year did it occur?
Who was Khadijah (رضي الله عنها)? Describe her role in the life of the Prophet ﷺ.
